name: SANUWAVE Health, Inc.
business: Sanuwave markets the UltraMIST system, a non-contact low-frequency ultrasound device for wound healing and debridement, to healthcare professionals. The system treats acute and chronic wounds including diabetic foot ulcers, venous leg ulcers, and pressure injuries. The company generates revenue primarily from consumables (58% of 2025 revenue) and system sales.

exposures.sentence: The UltraMIST system delivers low frequency, non-thermal ultrasound to target tissues using a fluid mist to transmit energy in a non-contact, pain free fashion.

tamClaims.claim: We estimate the wound care market exceeds $67 billion per year in the United States
tamClaims.sentence: We estimate the wound care market exceeds $67 billion per year in the United States and is spread among a number of key categories
